violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the Quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 12/26/2025

The establishment is lacking hot water at the three bay sink, hand sink, and dump sink. Establishment is to use heated water at three bay sink until repair is made. New Violation. Correct By: 12/19/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 12/21/2025
